title: [Let's Do] LevelZ Compat
description: this mod brings parity with several lets do mods and levelz
body:
# OUTDATED! ## Use [RAY's LevelZ Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/rays-levelz-compat) instead. ![letsdocompatlevelz_title](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xR4YM0ND/Let-s-Do-Compat-LevelZ/refs/heads/1.20.1/Gallery/letsdocompatlevelz_title_wide.png) this mod brings parity with several [lets do mods](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu) and [levelz](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) ## Supported Mods
- [[Let's Do] Bakery - Farm&Charm Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bakery-farmcharm-compat) - [[Let's Do] Beachparty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-beachparty) - [[Let's Do] BloomingNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bloomingnature) - [[Let's Do] Brewery - Farm&Charm Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-brewery-farmcharm-compat) - [[Let's Do] Camping](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-camping) - [[Let's Do] Candlelight - Farm&Charm Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-candlelight-farmcharm-compat) - [[Let's Do] Farm & Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm) - [[Let's Do] HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews) - [[Let's Do] Lili's Lucky Lures](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-lilis-lucky-lures) - [[Let's Do] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow) - [[Let's Do] NetherVinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-nethervinery) - [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery) - [[Let's Do] WilderNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-wildernature)
## Customization You can disable each compat in the `letsdocompatlevelz.json5` config file. *Compats only load if the mod is loaded & the config is set to true (default)* ## Credits
